samples.pinyin: gēge shì yīgè hěn yǒnggǎn de rén.
samples.en: My brother is a very brave person.
samples.vi: Anh trai tớ là một người rất dũng cảm.

samples.sentence: 她是我們班的漢語老師。
samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒmen bān de hànyǔ lǎoshī.
samples.en: She is the Chinese teacher of our class.

samples.pinyin: wáng lǎoshī, jīntiān nín zěnme yàng?
samples.en: Teacher Wang, how are you today?

samples.pinyin: kànshū kěyǐ zēngjiā zhīshi.
samples.en: Reading books can increase knowledge.

samples.sentence: 我們在圖書館裡/裏看書。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen zài túshūguǎn lǐ kànshū.
samples.en: We are reading books in the library.

samples.pinyin: nǐ yǒu jǐ gè xiōngdì jiěmèi?
samples.en: How many siblings do you have?

samples.pinyin: tā mǎile jǐ běn zhōngwén shū?
samples.en: How many Chinese books did he buy?

samples.pinyin: tā yǒu jǐ gè hǎo péngyǒu.
samples.en: He has several good friends.

samples.pinyin: wǒ mǎile jǐ běn zhōngwén shū.
samples.en: I bought a few Chinese books.

samples.meaning: used before nouns that do not have specific measure words
samples.pinyin: zhè lǐ yǒu yīgè píngguǒ.
samples.en: There is an apple here.
samples.vi: Ở đây có một quả táo.

samples.meaning: used before nouns that do not have specific measure words
samples.pinyin: zhuōzi shàng yǒu yīgè bēizi.
samples.en: There is a cup on the table.

samples.sentence: 有些個地方我還沒去過。
samples.pinyin: yǒuxiē gè dìfāng wǒ hái méi qùguò.
samples.en: There are some places I haven’t been to.

samples.pinyin: zhèxiē gè cài dōu hěn hǎo chī.
samples.en: These dishes are all very delicious.
samples.vi: Mấy món này đều rất ngon.

samples.pinyin: tā de xuǎnzé hěn gèxìng huà.
samples.en: Her choice is very personalized.

samples.pinyin: měi gèrén de yìjiàn dōu gèbié.
samples.en: Everyone's opinion is individual.
samples.vi: Mỗi người có ý kiến riêng biệt.

samples.pinyin: tā zuìjìn shǒu lǐ méi qián.
samples.en: He doesn't have money recently.
samples.vi: Anh ấy dạo gần đây không có tiền.

samples.pinyin: wǒ méiyǒu yīfu chuānle.
samples.en: I have no clothes to wear.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen hái méi qùguò běijīng.
samples.en: We haven't been to Beijing yet.
samples.vi: Chúng ta chưa từng đến Bắc Kinh.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen mòshōu dào rènhé tōngzhī.
samples.en: We haven't received any notice.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi chưa nhận được bất kỳ thông báo nào.

samples.pinyin: tā jiùshì wǒ de qīn xiōngdi.
samples.en: He is my real brother.
samples.vi: Em ấy chính là em trai của tôi.

samples.pinyin: tā zhàogù tā de xiǎo xiōngdi.
samples.en: He takes care of his little brother.
samples.vi: Anh ấy chăm sóc em trai nhỏ của mình.

samples.pinyin: jiěmèi liǎ xǐhuān yīqǐ wán.
samples.en: The two sisters like to play together.
samples.vi: Hai chị em thích chơi cùng nhau.

samples.pinyin: wǒ de jiěmèi hěn cōngmíng.
samples.en: My sister is very smart.
samples.vi: Chị em của tôi rất thông minh.

samples.pinyin: tā jīntiān mǎile wǔ gè píngguǒ.
samples.en: She bought five apples today.

samples.pinyin: wǔ yuè wǔ hào shì tā de shēngrì.
samples.en: May 5th is her birthday.
